zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale於1094年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德利斯達爾時，他的父親Rodolphus Umfreville35歲，母親Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville29歲。他去世於1166年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普盧多享年72歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale于1094年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德利斯達爾时，他的父亲Rodolphus Umfreville35岁，母亲Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville29岁。他去世于1166年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德普盧多享年72岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Odonell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Donnell
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish and Irish surname Mac Dhomhnuill, derived in the Middle Ages from the given name Domhnall .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale was born in 1094, in Ridsdale, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Rodolphus Umfreville, was 35 and his mother, Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, was 29. He died in 1166, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Hexham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale est né en 1094, à Ridsdale, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rodolphus Umfreville, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, avait 29 ans. Il est décédé en 1166, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale 1094 in Ridsdale, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rodolphus Umfreville 35 und seine Mutter Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville 29. Er starb 1166 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hexham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale è nato il nel 1094 nel Ridsdale, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rodolphus Umfreville, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, aveva 29 anni. Morì nel 1166, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Hexham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdaleが1094年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドリドスダルで生まれた時，父Rodolphus Umfrevilleは35歳，母Mrs Rodolphus Umfrevilleは29歳であった。彼は1166年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで72歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(이)가 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 리드즈데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rodolphus Umfreville(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale nasceu em 1094, em Ridsdale, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rodolphus Umfreville, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, tinha 29 anos. Ele faleceu em 1166, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale родился в 1094 г. в местности ридсдеил, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rodolphus Umfreville было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, 29. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Odonell I de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale nació en 1094, en Ridsdale, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Rodolphus Umfreville, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs Rodolphus Umfreville, tenía 29 años. Murió en 1166, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
